metadata.name: Report Suspected Child Abuse or Neglect

description: A citizen is calling a hotline to make a report of suspected child abuse.

nodes.task_description: Handle the call with empathy and professionalism, assuring the caller of confidentiality if requested.

expected_outcome.value: The agent creates a safe environment for the caller to make a report.

nodes.task_description: Gather all pertinent information about the child, the alleged perpetrator, and the nature of the suspected abuse or neglect.

expected_outcome.value: The agent carefully documents all details provided by the caller.

nodes.task_description: Create a formal report in the child protective services system for immediate review and assignment to an investigator.

expected_outcome.value: The agent successfully logs the report, triggering an urgent response.
